overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked industrial urban area. The player moves along fenced corridors, crosses intersections with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, and passes under overpasses and building awnings in a dystopian city environment with heavy atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial fenced corridor with overhead billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked industrial path beside a high security fence with barbed wire

entered.detail: tall industrial security fence with barbed wire topping running parallel to the walkway
large illuminated digital billboard displaying a woman's face, suspended over the street
metal scaffolding and industrial pipes along the fence line with orange safety markings
poured concrete wall base supporting the fence structure
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging electrical wires spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-soaked industrial corridor defined by a high chain-link fence with barbed wire on the left. A massive digital billboard hangs overhead, casting colored light onto the wet pavement. The camera moves steadily forward along the fenced pathway, with industrial scaffolding and concrete walls visible through the fence.

events.description: exiting the enclosed fenced corridor into the open intersection area beneath the overpass
crossing the wet street alongside pedestrians carrying umbrellas

agents.ego_description: navigating across the intersection while moving around pedestrians with umbrellas and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person holding a black umbrella crossing the street from right to left
group of pedestrians walking under the overpass ahead

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning the intersection with embedded lights
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage on the right side
vehicles parked along the left curb including a yellow car
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera exits the fenced corridor into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass. The digital billboard remains visible to the right while street-level shops and parked cars come into view. Pedestrians with umbrellas appear, crossing the wet street alongside the camera as it moves through the crosswalk.

events.description: entering covered walkway under building overhang, gaining shelter from the rain

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered concrete sidewalk passing under building overhangs and approaching a stairway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead under the overhang moving away from camera

entered.detail: concrete and metal awning extending from the building providing shelter from rain
external HVAC units mounted on the building wall with visible vents and piping
wall with red and black graffiti tags and weathered paint
concrete stairs and ramp structure leading up to the overpass level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a building overhang, gaining shelter from the heavy rain. The environment shifts to a covered sidewalk lined with air conditioning units and graffiti-covered walls. Ahead, a concrete stairway and ramp lead up toward the overpass level while the camera continues forward along the protected walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial area with traditional architecture

events.description: emerging from covered walkway into open street with traditional Asian architecture visible
approaching crosswalk and slowing to observe the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the crosswalk while observing the traditional architecture and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the distance near the traditional buildings

entered.detail: low-rise buildings with distinctive curved Asian-style tile roofs and wooden facades
tall palm tree trunk visible on the street median
zebra crossing markings on the wet street surface
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into an open street featuring a mix of traditional Asian architecture with curved tile roofs on the left and modern distant skyscrapers ahead. A palm tree stands on the median as the camera approaches a crosswalk. The rain continues to fall, creating reflections on the wet pavement as the scene transitions from industrial to commercial zoning.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins by moving steadily along a rain-soaked pathway enclosed by a high chain-link fence with barbed wire, while a massive digital billboard overhead casts vibrant colored light onto the wet pavement. As the camera progresses, the narrow corridor opens up, shifting the perspective from the industrial scaffolding and concrete walls toward a broader city vista. The scene then expands beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the digital billboard recedes to the right to reveal street-level shops and parked cars. Finally, the camera glides through a crosswalk, merging with pedestrians carrying umbrellas as it enters the open flow of the rain-slicked intersection.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial corridor into an open, rain-slicked commercial street. It begins under a building overhang, moving along a covered sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and air conditioning units. As the camera passes a concrete stairway and ramp leading toward an overpass, the protected walkway gradually opens up. The scene then shifts into the open air, where the industrial surroundings give way to a mix of traditional Asian architecture with curved tile roofs and distant modern skyscrapers. Finally, the camera approaches a crosswalk past a solitary palm tree, with the heavy rain creating vivid reflections on the wet pavement.
